# 📚 MASH E-Commerce - Master Documentation Index

**Last Updated:** November 20, 2025  
**Project Status:** ✅ PRODUCTION READY  
**Quick Start:** See sections below

---

## 🚀 **IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED**

### ⚠️ Your Homepage Shows "No featured products available yet"

**FIX THIS NOW (30-45 minutes):**

👉 **Open and follow:** [`BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md`](./BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md)

**What You'll Do:**
1. Open Sanity Studio: https://mash-ecommerce.sanity.studio
2. Create 6 categories (copy/paste from guide)
3. Add 20 sample mushroom products (templates provided)
4. Mark 8+ products as "Featured"  
5. Refresh homepage → Products appear! ✅

**After This:**
- ✅ Homepage displays 8 featured products in carousel
- ✅ Shop page shows 20+ products with filters
- ✅ Fully functional e-commerce site

## 🐛 Common Issues & Solutions

### Issue: "No featured products available yet"
**Solution:** Follow [`BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md`](./BULK_SAMPLE_DATA_GUIDE.md)

### Issue: Shop page empty
**Solution:** Add products in Sanity Studio (see guide above)

### Issue: Console 404 errors
**Solution:** See [`API_ERROR_FIXES_COMPLETE.md`](./API_ERROR_FIXES_COMPLETE.md) - These are expected and suppressed

## 🎉 Success Checklist

Your site is ready when:
- [ ] 20+ products in Sanity Studio
- [ ] 8+ products marked as "Featured"
- [ ] Homepage shows featured products carousel
- [ ] Shop page displays all products
- [ ] Category filters work correctly
- [ ] Product detail pages load properly
